name: Remote System Discovery
description: Detects network scanning and remote system enumeration
query:
// Detect remote system discovery via network tools
// Trigger on ping sweeps, arp scanning, or net view
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(ping\s+-[cn]|arp\s+-a|net\s+view|nltest|dsquery\s+computer|nbtstat\s+-[rRnN]|Get-ADComputer)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 3
within 120 seconds
